# services.octoprint

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.octoprint`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.octoprint.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable OctoPrint, web interface for 3D printers. |
| `services.octoprint.extraConfig` | `attribute set` | Extra options which are added to OctoPrint's YAML configuration file. |
| `services.octoprint.group` | `string` | Group for the daemon. |
| `services.octoprint.host` | `null or string` | Host to bind OctoPrint to. |
| `services.octoprint.openFirewall` | `boolean` | Open ports in the firewall for OctoPrint. |
| `services.octoprint.package` | `package` | The octoprint package to use. |
| `services.octoprint.plugins` | `function that evaluates to a(n) list of package` | Additional plugins to be used. Available plugins are passed through the plugins input. |
| `services.octoprint.port` | `16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)` | Port to bind OctoPrint to. |
| `services.octoprint.stateDir` | `absolute path` | State directory of the daemon. |
| `services.octoprint.user` | `string` | User for the daemon. |
